title: Extra Player Render (Paper Doll)
description: Render a player entity on the screen
body:
**Want to use a simple Live2D in Minecraft live?**  
**Although this mod is not that powerful, it is not a problem to make a fake Live2D**  
**It does not require any settings!** 

   
**This mod is client only! The server does not need to be installed! No dependencies are required!**

 

After installing this mod, enter the game, the game will look like this: 

![1](https://i.loli.net/2020/09/12/LbgxCYewMcDpRsh.png)

Of course, because it is directly called the vanilla rendering, other mod with modified player models can also be compatible!  
For example, [Custom Player Model](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-player-model-cpm) mod: 

![2](https://i.loli.net/2020/09/12/SwtBv1dALH8GrVl.png)

The compatibility of the [Quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark) is natural, and you can even use it with the [Custom Player Model](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/custom-player-model-cpm) mod: 

![3](https://i.loli.net/2020/09/12/Vh2zieNx4IHJEpW.png)

Of course, the size, position, and angle of the characters displayed on the screen can be customized!  
You only need to enter the **/epr** command __**(versions 1.13, 1.14, 1.15, and 1.16 are the Alt and P keys pressed at the same time)**__ to open such a GUI. Follow the instructions in the GUI and use the left mouse button, right mouse button, and scroll wheel to adjust the angle, position and size of the character. 

![4](https://i.loli.net/2021/05/11/mxX5cptA9UTQWjY.png)

For example, we demonstrate a picture and adjust the character to the rendering effect of the upper left corner of the bedrock version: 

![5](https://i.loli.net/2020/09/12/qsYRaUAVl7Fy8iw.png)
